ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sensor_data" (
  "timestamp" TEXT /* The exact time when the data was recorded */,
  "atm_pressure" REAL /* The atmospheric pressure reading from the sensor */,
  "freq" REAL /* The frequency reading from the sensor */,
  "therm_res" REAL /* The thermal resistance reading from the sensor */,
  "temperature" REAL /* The temperature reading from the sensor */,
  "pressure" REAL /* The pressure reading from the sensor */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* The source of the data (e.g., real-time, historical) */,
  "data_accuracy" REAL /* The accuracy of the data */,
  "data_reliability" TEXT /* The reliability of the data */,
  "data_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("timestamp"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_type" INTEGER /* The type of sensor (e.g., atmospheric pressure sensor) */,
  "location" INTEGER /* The location where the sensor is installed */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* The date when the sensor was installed */,
  "sensor_model" TEXT /* The model of the sensor */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* The manufacturer of the sensor */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* The last calibration date */,
  "calibration_due_date" TEXT /* The next calibration due date */,
  "status" TEXT /* The current status of the sensor (e.g., active, maintenance, decommissioned) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_sensor_type FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_type") REFERENCES sensor_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_location FOREIGN KEY ("location") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sensor type */,
  "min_value" REAL /* The minimum value the sensor can measure */,
  "max_value" REAL /* The maximum value the sensor can measure */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* The unit of measurement for the sensor data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "geo_coordinates" TEXT /* Geographical coordinates of the location */,
  "elevation" REAL /* The elevation of the location */,
  "environment_type" TEXT /* The type of environment (e.g., urban, rural, forest) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* The department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The last login date and time */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* The status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* The timestamp of the sensor data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* The IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "session_duration" TEXT /* The duration of the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_timestamp FOREIGN KEY ("timestamp") REFERENCES sensor_data ("timestamp"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data quality record */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* The timestamp of the sensor data */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor */,
  "quality_status" TEXT /* Status of the data quality (e.g., good, bad) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the data quality */,
  "quality_score" REAL /* A quantitative measure of data quality */,
  "reviewed_by" TEXT /* The name of the person who reviewed the data quality */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* The date when the data quality was reviewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_timestamp FOREIGN KEY ("timestamp") REFERENCES sensor_data ("timestamp"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_records" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that was maintained */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date when the maintenance activity was performed */,
  "activity_description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance activity */,
  "performed_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who performed the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_cost" REAL /* The cost of the maintenance activity */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the maintenance (e.g., completed, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* The timestamp of the sensor data used in the report */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., daily, monthly, annual) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* The name of the person who created the report */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* The date when the report was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the report (e.g., draft, finalized) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_reports_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_reports_timestamp FOREIGN KEY ("timestamp") REFERENCES sensor_data ("timestamp")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* The timestamp of the sensor data used in the visualization */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., chart, map) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the visualization */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* The name of the person who created the visualization */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* The date when the visualization was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the visualization (e.g., draft, finalized) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_visualizations_timestamp FOREIGN KEY ("timestamp") REFERENCES sensor_data ("timestamp"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_visualizations_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)
